history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian woman with long, dark hair stands in front of a large, reddish-brown monument at the summit of Mount Batur. She is wearing a dark blue jacket with white stripes on the sleeves, a black backpack, and gray sweatpants. She is holding a hiking pole in her hands. The monument has inscriptions in gold lettering and features the Indonesian coat of arms (Garuda Pancasila) and the Indonesian flag. The text on the monument seems to describe the history and significance of Mount Batur, including its elevation, volcanic activity, and its designation as a geopark. The background is a misty, overcast sky, and the foreground is adorned with dark rocks and scattered flower petals in various colors like red, yellow, and purple. Lush green foliage is visible around the base of the monument and rocks. The overall mood is one of accomplishment and serene natural beauty, despite the slightly melancholic atmosphere created by the mist. The lighting is diffused and natural, typical of an overcast mountain environment. The style is photographic, capturing a moment of exploration and discovery.
